global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text elements promoting a travel service.

elements.label: green abstract background
elements.description: A vibrant green abstract background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: WayPoint
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'WayPoint' in a modern sans-serif font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Dream
elements.description: Stylized text saying 'Dream' in a smaller font, positioned centrally with a playful design.

elements.label: destinations await
elements.description: Text stating 'destinations await' in a clear, inviting font, centered below the headline.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Informative text reading 'Flexible booking options' in a smaller font, located just below the main body text.

elements.label: Watch now
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in bold, inviting font, located at the bottom of the ad.
